person

James Dragov

A rogue lieutenant of Aaron Keener who leads the Rikers sub-group operating in Lower Manhattan.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Lower Manhattan

Dragov connects Keener's rogue-agent network to the reorganized Rikers encountered in Lower Manhattan. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The Warlords of New York faction recap identifies James Dragov as leader of the Rikers sub-group in Lower Manhattan. [1]

  2. confirmed

    The same official recap identifies Dragov as one of Aaron Keener's rogue lieutenants. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: Meet the Factions of Warlords of New York — Ubisoft News (2020-02-19). Accessed 2026-07-19.
